strategyOverview: This spec defines the validation strategy for the ingestion, orchestration, and code-generation pipelines. Because the outputs are visually rendered code (React ASTs), we will heavily rely on visual regression testing alongside standard unit/integration layers.

acceptanceCriteria.description: System must return a 202 Accepted within 500ms of receiving a valid Figma webhook, regardless of payload size.
Generated React components must pass strict ESLint validation without manual intervention.

focusAreas: Database UPSERT behavior during component updates
Redis pub/sub event broadcasting to the orchestration harness
End-to-end pipeline from mock webhook to PR generation
criticalUserJourneys: Publishing a new Design System Token
Updating an existing React component with new CSS variants

complianceChecks: Verify generated code contains no hardcoded API keys
Verify external payloads cannot execute arbitrary shell commands (Prompt Injection)

testDataManagement.refreshCadence: Loaded via JSON fixtures on every test run
dataDependencies: JSON snapshots of production Figma document nodes
